steps.title: Compare the coefficients
steps.content: Form ratios of the matching $x$, $y$, and constant terms in $$3.5x + 1.2y = 8$$ and $$17.5x + 6y = 40$$. This gives $\frac{17.5}{3.5}=\frac{6}{1.2}=\frac{40}{8}=5$.

steps.title: Identify the answer
steps.content: All three ratios are equal, so the equations are equivalent — infinitely many solutions. That matches choice C — C is correct.
